questionHtml: State two assumptions that Laetitia makes in order to conduct the test.
markschemeHtml:
Any two correct assumptions identified,                    A1A1
e.g.
That Laetitia’s clients are a random sample of the city’s population
That people take only one holiday a year
That the choice of individual holidays is independent
That Laetitia is her clients’ only agent

Note: Accept “assumes the proportion that takes a holiday abroad is 42%”.

[2 marks]

meta.title: State two assumptions that Laetitia makes in order to conduct the test.
breadcrumbLabels: AHL 4.18—T and Z test, type I and II errors
